pi_items.source: Web search for 'Metro Lifeline Ambulance Service' and 'Metro Lifeline Ambulance Service Missouri' returned no results matching this specific service name
Web search for 'Diana Hartwell EMS Operations ambulance' and 'Diana Hartwell Missouri' found no results matching this person in an EMS operations context
Confirmed via web search - Jefferson City is the capital of Missouri and is a real city in Cole County
Confirmed - MO is the standard abbreviation for Missouri, and Jefferson City is located in Cole County, MO

pi_items.metadata_value: 2710 Commerce Park Drive, Jefferson City, MO 65109
pi_items.source: Web search for '2710 Commerce Park Drive Jefferson City Missouri' returned no specific results for this address
Area code 573 is verified as covering Jefferson City, Missouri. However, the specific phone number does not appear in any web search results. The actual Cole County EMS phone is (573) 634-5678
Web search confirmed that area code 573 serves eastern Missouri including Jefferson City and Cole County, with overlay 235. 573 went into service January 7, 1996

Cole County Emergency Medical Services (colecounty.org/345/Emergency-Medical-Services-EMS) is the verified primary EMS provider for Jefferson City/Cole County. Located at 1736 Southridge Drive, Jefferson City, MO 65109, phone (573) 634-5678, email emsadmin@colecounty.org

pi_items.verified_value: .mer is a legacy CAMEO database format
pi_items.source: Web search confirmed that .mer files were used in older versions of CAMEO/CAMEOfm as database export format. Modern CAMEO uses CSV and other formats. Path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO Data Manager\CameoData.mer' appears to be a Windows test environment path

Verified via EPA and NOAA sources. CAMEO = Computer-Aided Management of Emergency Operations. CAMEO Data Manager is a legitimate database tool for managing emergency response data, chemical inventories, and facility information under EPCRA requirements
These are generic, standard keywords for emergency medical services resources. Consistent with CAMEO Data Manager category systems for emergency response resources

privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding a fictional EMS resource called 'Metro Lifeline Ambulance Service' to a CAMEO Data Manager database. This is synthetic test data for training an AI agent to interact with emergency response planning software. The real EMS provider in Jefferson City, Missouri is Cole County Emergency Medical Services. The area code 573 is correctly assigned to Jefferson City. The database format (.mer file) is a legacy CAMEO format. All specific claims about the fictional 'Metro Lifeline' service—including the contact name Diana Hartwell, specific address (2710 Commerce Park Drive), phone numbers, and facility details—cannot be verified and appear to be fabricated for testing purposes.
